description_long: This police station is a rectangular, two-story public building surrounded by a perimeter wall and a row of tall, leafy trees along one side. The main entrance faces a wide road, with a ramp and stairs leading up to a gated parking area where several cars are parked. The building features a flat roof, multiple windows, and a few visible doors, with some rooftop structures and utility elements. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, and the grounds include paved walkways and a small security booth near the entrance. The overall design is functional and institutional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on security and accessibility. The presence of trees and a clear separation from the street suggest an emphasis on privacy and controlled access.
description: A modern, two-story police station with a gated parking lot, flat roof, and perimeter wall, surrounded by trees and facing a main road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, ramp, stairs, parking area with cars, and the row of trees behind the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the gated parking lot, and the trees lining the property.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the row of tall trees, with the back of the building and roof structures partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the road, trees, and the side of the building with some rooftop details.
attribute_building_facade_features: Flat roof, multiple rectangular windows, main entrance with ramp and stairs, perimeter wall, security booth, and gated parking area.
